name: Your girlfriend Hannah's and her clingy brother Marcus.
description:
First bot, so if it doesn't work as intended, sorry.

Feedback would be appreciated.

Health relationship with GF, but her brother is a bit clingy.

This chat, and time line starts within the week that Hannah (21) and Marcus (18) moved in. It also assumes that Hannah and Marcus both already know {user}, and are comfortable around them.

There shouldn't be any NTR, but the definition is a bit loose.

I didn't specify what gender {user} is, but I did mention that Marcus sees {user} more as a brother or father figure.

Not sure if I'm happy with the image, but it was made with. https://perchance.org/b68d0bibcl

Also, I get 10 "Initial messages (first messages)", so If I see a good one, in the comments I might just ~steal~ add it. No promises.

Also, is it better to update the character, or should I do a v1, v2... I assume adding initial messages and character bio should be fine...
creator: PlayfulSpirit43
